prompt: Offline build, and this one matters: I want Derivative's audioAnalysis palette component embedded BY NAME from my TD install — do not rebuild its guts from scratch. Call it analysis. Feed it: music (an Audio File In CHOP) wired into the analysis component's input. Tap it twice on the way out: the main analysis output into a null called bands, and the component's SECOND output into its own null called aux — picked by name, not by luck. Build the project as audio_rig (mode tox) with output_dir {{RUN_DIR}} and validate it. Then show me evidence from the built files themselves that the wiring both INTO and OUT of the component made it to disk — wires into embedded components have silently vanished on me before, so I want file-level proof, not reassurance.
notes: validate=null (not PASS): td_validate/ValidationPipeline cannot resolve wires that cross a palette/external_tox placeholder boundary (inner out-ops are invisible at design level) — verified 2026-07-04. The artifact-level .parm/.n/.network assertions are the ground truth here; product gap flagged in the W2c report.
